title: Ping Viewer
description: A simple plugin that allows you to see your ping with a command
body:
# **Ping Viewer**

**A simple and lightweight plugin that allows players to instantly check their current latency (ping) to the server with a single command.**

---

## **⭐ Core Features**

*   **Instant Ping Display:** Provides an immediate and accurate reading of a player's ping in milliseconds.
*   **Zero Configuration:** No setup required.
*   **Extremely Lightweight:** Designed to be highly efficient with no impact on server performance.
*   **User-Friendly:** Clean and simple output makes it easy for any player to check their connection status.

---

## **⌨️ Commands & Permissions**

The main command is **/ping**.

*   **/ping**
    *   Displays your current ping to the server.
    *   **Default:** Granted to all players.

---

## **💡 Suggestions & Feedback**

**Want to request changes or need support? Join my Discord and share your ideas!**

🔗 https://discord.gg/kGfcXWG7mx
